creator: setantae@submonkey.net
text:
The link to ``MAINTAINER on Makefiles'' at http://www3.uk.freebsd.org/porters-handbook/x582.html points to http://www3.uk.freebsd.org/handbook/policies.html#POLICIES-MAINTAINER which 404's.

Fix: 

1) Take out the ``3'' from the URI.

	2) Fix the mirror ?
How-To-Repeat: 	Follow said link above.
